name: ASRock B850M-X Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - M.2 Socket (Key E) - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B850M-X Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: ASRock B850M-X Micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 4.0, and dual video outputs for compact AMD builds.
